title: 有馬記念の後に・昂揚

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond beats Kitasan Black and takes
first place!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A reporter asks about her future plans in the
post-race interview, and Kitasan Black suggests
that they face off again at the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond agrees, and the crowd is thrilled
at the prospect of a rematch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After returning to her waiting room, Satono
Diamond says Kitasan Black has already
contributed to the Umamusume world by always
getting the fans excited.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wonders what she ought to do as an
illustrious runner, and explains that she wants to
use Kitasan Black as an example to think about
her own role.
